name: agent-capability-kit
description: Authoring kit for Claude Code plugins, agents, commands/prompts, and cross-platform Agent Skills.

interface.shortDescription: Authoring kit for plugins, agents, commands, and cross-platform Agent Skills.
interface.longDescription: Install the Agent Capability Kit to author Claude Code plugins, agents, commands and prompts, and cross-platform Agent Skills with consistent structure, progressive disclosure, and validation guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use the plugin-authoring skill to scaffold or refactor a Claude Code plugin root.
Use the skill-authoring skill to create or revise a cross-platform Agent Skill.
Use the command-authoring or agent-authoring skill to design commands and agents with explicit frontmatter and bounded tool access.
